faq.q: How is this different from every other "AI jobs" list?
faq.a: Most lists keyword-match "AI" in the title, which floods them with roles that merely mention AI. Dreamwork runs an LLM classifier over every one of its 400,000+ crawled listings and labels each role AI-first (building AI is the job), AI-focused (AI/ML explicitly central), or merely AI-enabled. This list only includes the first two tiers.

faq.q: How often is this list updated?
faq.a: Every day, by a GitHub Action pulling from Dreamwork's public API. Thousands of new AI roles are classified every week — see the live AI Labor Index for trends.

faq.q: What kinds of roles show up here?
faq.a: ML engineers, LLM/GenAI engineers, applied and research scientists, AI product managers, AI infrastructure/platform engineers, and AI-native GTM roles — across startups and the Fortune 500. Use <kbd>Ctrl</kbd>+<kbd>F</kbd> to filter.

faq.q: Can a tool just apply to these for me?
faq.a: That's what Dreamwork does — it matches your résumé against every AI listing here, tailors your application, and can apply autonomously. The free tier shows all your matches.
